subject: Q1 2026 Update
author: Dario Amodei
sensitive_topics: FTC investigation — do not speculate on outcomes
context: Strong product momentum but regulatory uncertainty.

subject: FTC Investigation FAQ
author: Legal & Communications
tone: calm, factual, reassuring without dismissing concerns
key_points: FTC has opened an inquiry into AI data practices across the industry
Anthropic is cooperating fully and transparently
No current impact on day-to-day operations
Employees should direct press inquiries to Comms team
sensitive_topics: Do not speculate on investigation outcomes or timeline
Do not discuss specific data practices under review
Do not compare our practices to competitors
context: Employees are anxious after news coverage of the FTC inquiry. This FAQ aims to address concerns directly.

subject: Welcome to New Team Members — March Cohort
author: Head of People
key_points: 45 new team members joining in March across engineering, policy, and sales
Buddy program available for onboarding support
First all-hands for new cohort on March 15
context: Routine monthly welcome message. No sensitive topics.
